name: linear
description: Linear integration — fetch issues and projects through the plugin API proxy
author: zorai

token.label: Linear API Token
token.description: Linear API token used for authenticated GraphQL requests

body.query: query { issues(first: 1, filter: { identifier: { eq: "{{params.identifier}}" } }) { nodes { id identifier title description url priority state { name } project { name } team { key name } } } }
query { issues(first: {{default params.first "20"}}) { nodes { id identifier title url state { name } team { key } } } }
query { projects(first: {{default params.first "20"}}) { nodes { id name state url lead { name } } } }

issue.description: Fetch Linear issue details by identifier
